summary: All acceptance criteria verified. Controller skill updated: retro is MANDATORY, no skip conditions, no direct merge. 1287/1289 tests pass (2 pre-existing failures). TypeScript clean. Biome clean.

criteriaResults.criterion: After review completes (approved), controller MUST dispatch retro worker — no exceptions
criteriaResults.evidence: Verified by code inspection: SKILL.md lines 749-753 — retro section now reads: The retro phase is MANDATORY. Every issue that passes review gets a retro. No exceptions. Always dispatch retro after review approval. Do not check routing hints, skipRetro flags, or any other conditions.
Verified by diff: 57 lines deleted from SKILL.md including entire skipRetro bash block. grep for skipRetro/skip_retro/SKIP_RETRO in SKILL.md returns 0 code-path matches.

criteriaResults.criterion: Add explicit enforcement: retro is MANDATORY
criteriaResults.evidence: Verified by code inspection: SKILL.md line 431 (MUST NOT skip list), line 749 (Retro section), line 753 (unconditional dispatch), line 769 (ADAPTIVE ROUTING GUARDRAILS), line 939 (anti-pattern table).

criteriaResults.criterion: worker-done on review should NOT trigger merge until retro completes
criteriaResults.evidence: Verified by code inspection: decision.ts lines 140-142 — IssueStatus.RETRO + hasWorkerDone → dispatch_merger. Pre-merge gate condition 5 requires retro handoff.

testCritique: No new unit tests — change is purely to a skill markdown file. Existing decision.ts tests cover retro→merge transitions. CI: lint/test/typecheck all pass.
